    Dr. Sudhan successfully passed the Final Board examinations in first attempt, conducted by the National Board of examinations (NBE) after being trained for a period of two years in Medical Trust Hospital, Ernakulam. With 750 beds, it is one of the most advanced and premier hospitals in south India pioneering in the department of orthopaedics, treating almost every ailment in the field.
